regressors: NWSS National WVAL; NSSP smoothed influenza ED visit percentage; MMWR week sine/cosine; weeks since season start; lagged current-season cumulative admissions; lagged post-peak decline indicator
leakage_rule: For target week t, use covariates from t - 42 days; horizon 3 uses covariates no later than 21 days before the reference date.
